definitions: adj. 普遍存在的；广泛流传的（在此语境下指故事非常流行且常见）

examples.text:
disconnected and powerless in the face of 
problems too big to solve. And so the state of the world fills many of us with doom, 
hopelessness and sadness. We feel it too. It is one of the most pervasive stories of 
our time and there is a lot of truth to it. But as Terry Pratchett said, we are the 
storytelling ape, we think in narratives and live in a network of stories that make up 
our world. So without minimising the darkness,
